since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.93%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.86% · Gold +1.14% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.93%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.93%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.96%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.28%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.28%, KLAC +3.76%, AMAT +3.73%, LRCX +3.56%, MRVL +3.47%. Laggards: CRM -2.57%, NOW -1.75%, ADBE -1.71%, ROK -1.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.42% at $150.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
